hero.subtitle: Track shared costs, see who owes what, and settle up — no accounts or subscriptions required.
features.sectionSubtitle: Tools for splitting costs, tracking balances, and settling up.
feature1.title: Groups
feature1.desc: Create groups for trips, homes, or events.
feature2.title: Flexible Splits
feature2.desc: Split equally, by amount, percentage, or custom weight.
feature3.title: Clear Balances
feature3.desc: See who owes what — updated after every change.
feature4.title: Simple Settlement
feature4.desc: The fewest transfers needed to zero all balances.
feature5.title: Export Everything
feature5.desc: Export your data as JSON, CSV, or PDF at any time.
feature6.title: No Accounts Needed
feature6.desc: No sign-up. No login. Works fully offline.
cta.headline: Ready to track shared expenses?
cta.subtext: Free, open-source, and offline. No accounts needed.
lang.label: Language
fallback.notice: This page is not yet available in your language. Showing English content.
product.title: How it Works
product.subtitle: From setting up a group to settling up — here's exactly how it works.
product.step1.title: Create group
product.step1.desc: Start by naming your group and adding the people involved.
product.step1.b1: Link dependents to the right adult
product.step1.b2: Each group tracks its own expenses
product.step2.title: Add expenses
product.step2.desc: Log each shared payment — who paid, what for, and who it covers.
product.step2.b1: Split equally, by amount, percentage, or weight
product.step2.b3: Any member can be the payer
product.step3.title: Check balances
product.step3.desc: See everyone's current balance at a glance — no math required.
product.step4.title: Expense list
product.step4.desc: Every expense in one place, from the first to the latest.
product.step4.b1: Full record from the first expense
product.step5.title: Settle up
product.step5.desc: LuSplit works out the fewest transfers to bring all balances to zero.
product.step5.b2: No money moves through the app
product.step5.b3: A suggestion to act on — no money moves in the app
product.step6.title: Record payments
product.step6.desc: Mark each payment done to keep balances accurate and the history clean.
product.closing: LuSplit handles nothing. All money moves directly between people. It makes shared costs simple.
